name: Penguin Runner Game
description: Get ready for the ultimate arctic adrenaline rush in Penguin Runner Game! Take control of a plucky, caped penguin hero on a high-speed dash across the frozen tundra. This isnt just a stroll through the snow, it’s a race against time, physics, and a flurry of frosty obstacles! The ice is thin, the pace is hot, and the adventure is endless. Whether youre dodging obstacles or chasing a new high score, every run is a fresh challenge.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Space Up Arrow X Key Jump Start Game Down Arrow Duck Slide Left Mouse Click Jump Enter Restart Game after Game Over
